question: How do I track my order?
answer: You can track your order by visiting our website and entering your Order ID in the 'Track Order' section. You'll also receive SMS updates at every delivery stage.

question: How long does delivery take?
answer: Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days within India. Express delivery (1-2 days) is available for an additional ₹99. Orders placed before 2 PM are dispatched the same day.

question: What is your return policy?
answer: We offer a 30-day return policy on all products. Items must be unused, in original packaging, with all tags intact. Refund is processed within 7 business days of return.

question: How do I return a product?
answer: To return a product, log in to your account, go to 'My Orders', select the item, and click 'Return'. Our courier partner will pick up the item from your address within 2 business days.

question: When will I get my refund?
answer: Once the return is picked up and verified, refund is processed within 5-7 business days. UPI/wallet refunds are faster (1-3 days). You'll receive an email confirmation.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), credit/debit cards, net banking, EMI, and Cash on Delivery (COD) for orders under ₹5000.

question: Is Cash on Delivery available?
answer: Yes, Cash on Delivery is available for orders up to ₹5000. COD is not available for certain remote pincodes and digital products.

question: What is your product warranty?
answer: Electronics come with a 1-year manufacturer warranty. Home appliances have 2-year warranty. Accessories and fashion items do not carry warranty. Warranty card is provided in the box.

question: How do I file a complaint?
answer: You can file a complaint here in this chat, through our website's 'Help Center', or by emailing support@techmart.in. Provide your order ID and a brief description of the issue.

question: I received a damaged product. What should I do?
answer: We're sorry for the inconvenience! Please take a photo of the damaged item and packaging, then raise a return/replacement request within 48 hours of delivery. We'll arrange a replacement immediately.

question: How do I cancel my order?
answer: Orders can be cancelled before dispatch by going to 'My Orders' and clicking 'Cancel'. Once dispatched, you'll need to refuse delivery or raise a return request after receiving it.

question: How do I reset my account password?
answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. Enter your registered email or phone, and you'll receive an OTP. Enter the OTP and set a new password. Takes less than 2 minutes.

question: How do I update my delivery address?
answer: Log in to your account → 'My Profile' → 'Addresses' → 'Add or Edit Address'. For an existing order that hasn't been dispatched, contact us immediately to update the address.

question: Where are your stores located?
answer: We have stores in Bengaluru (3 locations), Mumbai (2 locations), Delhi, Hyderabad, and Chennai. Use the 'Store Locator' on our website to find the nearest store with hours and address.

question: How do I contact a human support agent?
answer: You can reach our human agents via phone at 1800-123-4567 (toll-free, 9 AM - 9 PM) or request an escalation in this chat. Average wait time is 3-5 minutes.

question: How do I apply a coupon or promo code?
answer: During checkout, look for the 'Apply Coupon' box and enter your promo code. The discount will be applied to eligible items. One coupon per order. Not valid with other offers.

question: Why was my payment declined?
answer: Payments can be declined due to incorrect card details, insufficient funds, bank block on online transactions, or VPA issues. Please try a different payment method or contact your bank.

question: How do I subscribe to or cancel a subscription?
answer: Go to 'My Account' → 'Subscriptions' to view, modify, or cancel your active subscriptions. Cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing cycle.

question: I was charged twice for an order. What do I do?
answer: Double charges usually auto-reverse within 24-48 hours. If not, please share the transaction IDs and we'll resolve it within 3 business days with a full refund of the duplicate charge.

question: How do I avail EMI on my purchase?
answer: EMI is available on purchases above ₹3000 using credit cards from SBI, HDFC, ICICI, Axis, and Kotak. Select 'Pay via EMI' at checkout and choose your preferred tenure (3, 6, 9, or 12 months).

question: What is your exchange policy?
answer: We offer exchange on electronics and appliances within 10 days if the product is defective. Fashion items can be exchanged for a different size within 15 days. Same conditions as returns apply.

question: Why is my order delayed?
answer: Delays can be due to high demand, courier issues, weather disruptions, or address verification. You can check the live tracking link in your order confirmation SMS for real-time updates.

question: How do I get an invoice for my order?
answer: Your invoice is automatically emailed to your registered email after order placement. You can also download it from 'My Orders' → select order → 'Download Invoice'.

question: Can I change my order after placing it?
answer: Orders can be modified (size, color, quantity) within 30 minutes of placing, if not yet processed. After that, you'll need to cancel and re-order. Call us immediately at 1800-123-4567.

question: How do I access technical support for a product?
answer: For technical support, go to our website → 'Support' → 'Technical Help'. You can also chat with a technical expert (9 AM - 9 PM), raise a ticket, or call 1800-123-4567 (option 2).
